content:
## Changes

### New Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/agents/review/mod.rs` | ReviewAgent struct, ReviewAgentBuilder, ReviewAgentConfig |
| `src/agents/review/types.rs` | ReviewVerdict, ReviewIssue, Severity, ReviewType |
| `src/agents/crr.rs` | CRRCycle struct, CRRCycleBuilder, CRRResult |
| `prompts/review_spec.md` | System prompt for spec review |
| `prompts/review_code.md` | System prompt for code review |

### Modified Files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/agents/mod.rs` | Add `pub mod review;` and `pub mod crr;` |
| `src/lib.rs` | Re-export ReviewAgent, CRRCycle, ReviewVerdict |
| `src/error.rs` | Add `MaxRevisionsExceeded` variant to NovaError |

### Key Types

```rust
// agents/review/types.rs
pub enum ReviewType { Spec, Code }
pub enum Severity { High, Medium, Low }
pub struct ReviewIssue { severity, description, suggestion, location }
pub enum ReviewVerdict {
    Approved,
    NeedsRevision { issues: Vec<ReviewIssue> },
    Rejected { reason: String },
}

// agents/crr.rs
pub struct CRRCycle<C, R> { creator: C, reviewer: R, max_revisions, on_event }
pub struct CRRResult { verdict, artifact, revision_count }
```

### Test Plan

| Test | Type |
|------|------|
| ReviewAgent returns Approved | Unit |
| ReviewAgent returns NeedsRevision with issues | Unit |
| CRR approved on first review | Unit |
| CRR 2 revisions then approve | Unit |
| CRR max_revisions exceeded → error | Unit |
| CRR rejected → error | Unit |
